judgment.summary: A large, stable retailer with solid cash flow and returns, but facing slowing growth and a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-21.
positives: Free cash flow $10.55B TTM — strong generation funds operations and dividends.
Return on equity 21.8% — efficient use of shareholder capital.
Consensus 'strong buy' from 41 analysts with a mean target of $137.78.
Beta 0.65 — lower volatility than the broader market.
negatives: Forward P/E 37.17x — valuation is elevated relative to earnings growth.
Earnings growth -19.0% YoY and quarterly earnings growth -19.4% — profitability is declining.
Current ratio 0.79 and quick ratio 0.20 — liquidity is tight.
Total debt $68.43B vs $10.73B cash — significant leverage.

news.paragraph: Walmart stock dipped after guiding lower for the current quarter, citing the impact of high gas prices on consumer spending. Despite the near-term guidance cut, the company maintains a 'strong buy' consensus from analysts, with a mean target price suggesting upside potential. Traders should monitor the reaction to the guidance and the upcoming earnings release for further clues on consumer behavior.

headlines.title: Walmart Stock Falls As Dow Giant Guides Low Amid High Gas Prices
Walmart Inc. (WMT) Backed by Wall Street and Louis Navellier

examples.body: $WMT lil baron and Donny jr are buyers
$WMT what happened, is the bottom line getting hit by people getting taken off EBT?
$WMT i’ve been here all week boy, will someone educate his ass I don’t have the time I’m onto my next set up xx
